examples.title: Infix to Postfix Conversion
examples.description: Algorithm using stack for expression conversion
examples.code:
ALGORITHM InfixToPostfix
BEGIN
  Initialize stack
  FOR each token IN expression:
    IF operand: OUTPUT
    ELSE IF '(': PUSH
    ELSE IF ')': POP until '('
    ELSE: POP higher precedence operators
  EMPTY stack to OUTPUT
END
